Dual-Probe Safe Generation

Training-Free Concept Erasure via
Example-Based When + Where + How Guidance

Multi-Concept Inference-time Training-free

Progress Report · April 10, 2026

Method Overview

Full Pipeline: When + Where + How

WHEN
Global CAS Gate
→
WHERE
Dual Probe Mask
→
HOW
Anchor Inpaint

WHEN + WHERE

$\text{CAS}(t) = \cos(\epsilon_p - \epsilon_\varnothing,\; \epsilon_t - \epsilon_\varnothing) > \tau$
$\tau = 0.6$, sticky detection
Dual probe: text tokens + CLIP exemplar images
Fused via union: $M = A_{\text{text}} \cup A_{\text{img}}$

HOW

$\epsilon_{\text{safe}} = \epsilon_{\text{cfg}} \cdot (1 - s \cdot M) + \epsilon_{\text{anchor}} \cdot (s \cdot M)$
Inside mask: safe anchor guidance.
Outside mask: original generation preserved.
Total UNet calls: 3~4 (probe is FREE)

WHERE: Dual Cross-Attention Probe

Text Probe

$K_{\text{text}} = W_K \cdot \tau(\text{"nudity, nude, naked..."})$
$A_{\text{text}} = \text{softmax}(Q \cdot K_{\text{text}}^\top / \sqrt{d})$
Good for abstract concepts (violence, hate, harassment)

Image Probe

$\bar{f} = \frac{1}{N}\sum \text{CLIP}_{\text{cls}}(x_i^{\text{exemplar}})$
$K_{\text{img}} = W_K \cdot [\bar{f}, \bar{f}, \bar{f}, \bar{f}]$
$A_{\text{img}} = \text{softmax}(Q \cdot K_{\text{img}}^\top / \sqrt{d})$
Good for visual concepts (nudity, body parts)
Fusion: $M = A_{\text{text}} \cup A_{\text{img}}$. Zero extra UNet calls — hooks on existing forward pass.

Probe Mask: Spatial Localization

GradCAM visualization (no guidance)

Dual probe attention masks

Probe maps accurately localize unsafe body regions while ignoring safe background

Ablation & Analysis

Ablation: Text vs Image vs Both Probe

Best SR% per probe mode across different concepts

Probe ModeNudity (UD, 79)ViolenceHarassmentHateShocking
Text only77.297.183.384.897.8
Image only60.8————
Both (union)89.997.082.882.797.3
Nudity (concrete visual concept): Both probe > Text alone (+12.7pp). Image probe captures body-part features that text keywords miss.
Abstract concepts (violence, hate): Text probe ≈ Both. Text keywords sufficient for semantic concepts. Image probe doesn't hurt.
Both mode is the safest default — robust across all concept types.

Image Quality Preservation

FID (COCO 10k)

ConfigFID↓
Hybrid (ts75_as75)3.66
Anchor Inpaint (v4)3.95
Ours (Dual Probe)6.78
Higher FID = stronger safety guidance. Trade-off: more aggressive erasure → slightly less fidelity.

Generated Samples: Baseline vs Ours

Ring-A-Bell prompts. Baseline generates unsafe content; Ours preserves scene structure while erasing unsafe regions.

Summary & Next Steps

Training-free, competitive with training-based on nudity (94.1% SR on RAB)
Multi-concept: outperforms baselines on violence (+15pp), self-harm (+27pp)
Dual probe (text+image) gives robust spatial detection across all concept types
